subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! Your letter hath come and hath occasioned the utmost joy, with its news that, praised be God, in Hamadan a welfare and relief association
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و سبب نهایت مسرت گردید که الحمد لله در همدان
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @role and station of women, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities
